Name: WRF_PrntDir
Description: Filename prefix for WRF output files, appearing before the timestamp in the filename (e.g., wrf_fasteddy_d01\_ for wrf_fasteddy_d01_2024-02-16_17:00:00).

Name: date0
Description: Start date for the WRF file list in YYYY-MM-DD format. Combined with time* fields to form the initial timestamp.

Name: timeHour0
Description: Hour (UTC) of the first WRF output file to process.

Name: timeMinute0
Description: Minute (UTC) of the first WRF output file to process.

Name: timeSecond0
Description: Second (UTC) of the first WRF output file to process.

Name: secMax
Description: Total duration (seconds) to process WRF files.

Name: secInc
Description: Time increment (seconds) between WRF files. |br| Must exactly match the actual WRF output interval or files will not be found.
